'''鈭歷-m-j''' ('''kavamaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quirl|quirl]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-m-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quirl|quirl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-m-j
|-
! Lemma
| kavamaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivamaj|thivamaj]] || [[word:jivamaj|jivamaj]] || [[word:shivamaj|shivamaj]] || [[word:kivamaj|kivamaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvamaj|thuthuvamaj]] || [[word:jujuvamaj|jujuvamaj]] || [[word:shushuvamaj|shushuvamaj]] || [[word:kukuvamaj|kukuvamaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvamaj|thuvamaj]] || [[word:juvamaj|juvamaj]] || [[word:shuvamaj|shuvamaj]] || [[word:kuvamaj|kuvamaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvamaj|thuvamaj]] || [[word:juvamaj|juvamaj]] || [[word:shuvamaj|shuvamaj]] || [[word:kuvamaj|kuvamaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevamaj|thevamaj]] || [[word:jevamaj|jevamaj]] || [[word:shevamaj|shevamaj]] || [[word:kevamaj|kevamaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovamaj|thothovamaj]] || [[word:jojovamaj|jojovamaj]] || [[word:shoshovamaj|shoshovamaj]] || [[word:kokovamaj|kokovamaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovamaj|thovamaj]] || [[word:jovamaj|jovamaj]] || [[word:shovamaj|shovamaj]] || [[word:kovamaj|kovamaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovamaj|thovamaj]] || [[word:jovamaj|jovamaj]] || [[word:shovamaj|shovamaj]] || [[word:kovamaj|kovamaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙vamaj|th忙vamaj]] || [[word:j忙vamaj|j忙vamaj]] || [[word:sh忙vamaj|sh忙vamaj]] || [[word:k忙vamaj|k忙vamaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavamaj|thathavamaj]] || [[word:jajavamaj|jajavamaj]] || [[word:shashavamaj|shashavamaj]] || [[word:kakavamaj|kakavamaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavamaj|thavamaj]] || [[word:javamaj|javamaj]] || [[word:shavamaj|shavamaj]] || [[word:kavamaj|kavamaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavamaj|thavamaj]] || [[word:javamaj|javamaj]] || [[word:shavamaj|shavamaj]] || [[word:kavamaj|kavamaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavamaj|shavamaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavamaj|goshavamaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavamaj|gokishavamaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavamajn眉|shavamajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavamajnkn眉|goshavamajnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavamajn眉|gokishavamajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavamajsh毛|shavamajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavamajnksh毛|goshavamajnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavamajsh毛|gokishavamajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavamajro|shavamajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavamajnkro|goshavamajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavamajro|gokishavamajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavamajmu|shavamajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavamajnkmu|goshavamajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavamajmu|gokishavamajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavamajsher|shavamajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavamajnksher|goshavamajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavamajsher|gokishavamajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavamajng|shavamajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavamajnkng|goshavamajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavamajng|gokishavamajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavamajya|shavamajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavamajnkya|goshavamajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavamajya|gokishavamajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavamajyam|shavamajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavamajnkyam|goshavamajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavamajyam|gokishavamajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavamajn眉sh毛|shavamajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavamajnkn眉sh毛|goshavamajnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavamajn眉sh毛|gokishavamajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavamajn眉ro|shavamajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavamajnkn眉ro|goshavamajnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavamajn眉ro|gokishavamajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavamajn眉mu|shavamajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavamajnkn眉mu|goshavamajnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavamajn眉mu|gokishavamajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavamajsh毛n眉|shavamajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavamajnksh毛n眉|goshavamajnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavamajsh毛n眉|gokishavamajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavamajsh毛ro|shavamajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavamajnksh毛ro|goshavamajnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavamajsh毛ro|gokishavamajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavamajsh毛mu|shavamajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavamajnksh毛mu|goshavamajnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavamajsh毛mu|gokishavamajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavamajron眉|shavamajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavamajnkron眉|goshavamajnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavamajron眉|gokishavamajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavamajrosh毛|shavamajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavamajnkrosh毛|goshavamajnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavamajrosh毛|gokishavamajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavamajromu|shavamajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavamajnkromu|goshavamajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavamajromu|gokishavamajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavamajmun眉|shavamajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavamajnkmun眉|goshavamajnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavamajmun眉|gokishavamajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavamajmush毛|shavamajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavamajnkmush毛|goshavamajnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavamajmush毛|gokishavamajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavamajmuro|shavamajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavamajnkmuro|goshavamajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavamajmuro|gokishavamajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
